description_long: This house features a rectangular, elongated structure with a prominent red hip roof and white exterior walls. The facade is lined with large, evenly spaced windows, many of which are paired with brown awnings or overhangs, providing both shade and architectural interest. The main entryway is accentuated by a small overhang and a vertical window feature, suggesting a modern yet practical design. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper level also featuring a series of windows and balconies. The roof is primarily hip-style, sloping gently on all sides, and the overall design is clean and functional, with minimal ornamentation. The house is likely constructed from concrete or masonry, with glass windows and metal or wood accents.
description: A two-story, rectangular house with a red hip roof, white walls, and large windows with brown awnings. The design is modern and functional, featuring symmetrical window arrangements and a modest entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the shorter end of the house with a small awning above a window and the red hip roof sloping down, highlighting the building's depth.
description_view_1: The long side of the house is visible, displaying a row of large windows with brown awnings and the main entryway with a vertical window feature.
description_view_2: The opposite short end is shown, similar to view 0 but with a slightly different awning arrangement and less visible entry features.
description_view_3: This view highlights the other long side, with a continuous row of windows and awnings, and the hip roof extending across the length of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small overhang, vertical window feature, and minimal decorative elements
